title: React Events and Forms
description: Learn how to handle events and forms in React applications for interactive user interfaces.

subtopics.title: Event Handling Basics
Synthetic Events

glossary.definition: A function that executes in response to a specific event.
React's cross-browser wrapper around native browser events.
Form elements whose value is controlled by React state.
The process where events propagate from child to parent elements.
The process of ensuring user input meets specified requirements.
A method that prevents the default browser behavior for an event.
